name: golang-github-jacobsa-util-dev
title: golang-github-jacobsa-util-dev
description:
utility code for jacobsa projects
This is just a collection of miscellaneous code (such as an LRU cache and a
password input function) imported by other more interesting projects.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-jacobsa-util-dev because utility code for jacobsa projects.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-jacobsa-util-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-jacobsa-util-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-jacobsa-util-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
